should_trigger: the contractor uploaded a corrections letter and the plan binder
analyze this corrections letter for the Roslindale ADU
begin Phase 1 of the corrections pipeline
categorize each correction item and generate contractor questions
we received a city corrections letter — start the analysis
should_not_trigger: the contractor has answered the questions, generate the response package
